orchestrator_notes: Agents: read this file BEFORE starting. If orchestrator_directives contains STOP, halt immediately. 0855a and 0855b are independent and can run in parallel. 0855c depends on 0855a. 0855d depends on 0855a+b+c. 0855e depends on 0855b+c+d. 0855f depends on 0855a+c+d+e. 0855g depends on 0855f. NOTE: 0855b emission point in mcp_http.py may be deleted by 0846 (running on separate workstation). Wire schemas and EventFactory, but if mcp_http.py changes significantly, emit from the new SDK server location instead.
orchestrator_directives: 0855c used 0-indexed steps (0=Choose Tools, 1=Connect, 2=Install, 3=Launch). Step 2 Connect content renders at currentStep===1. Emit step-complete with {step:1, data:{...}}. Tool IDs: claude_code, codex_cli, gemini_cli.

sessions.title: Backend Schema + API Endpoints
planned_tasks: Add 3 columns to User model (setup_complete, setup_selected_tools, setup_step_completed)
tasks_completed: Added 3 columns to User model in auth.py (setup_complete, setup_selected_tools, setup_step_completed)
Created idempotent Alembic migration 0855a_setup_state (depends on baseline_v34)
Added SetupStateUpdate Pydantic model with step range validation (0-4)
Added PATCH /me/setup-state endpoint with partial update support
Added GET /api-keys/active endpoint with tenant isolation (user_id + tenant_key filter)
Updated UserProfileResponse to include setup fields with defaults
Updated GET /me to return setup fields from current_user
Created test_setup_wizard_endpoints.py with 9 Pydantic + 9 API tests
Verified migration runs idempotently on existing DB with columns already present
deviations: DB had stale alembic_version stamp (0844a_conventions from pre-squash). Stamped to baseline_v34 before running migration.
sessions.notes_for_next: **For 0855c (Overlay Shell):** User model columns: `setup_complete` (bool, default false), `setup_selected_tools` (JSONB list, nullable), `setup_step_completed` (int 0-4, default 0). Pydantic model: `SetupStateUpdate` in `api/endpoints/auth.py`. Endpoints: `PATCH /api/auth/me/setup-state` (accepts partial updates, returns {setup_complete, setup_selected_tools, setup_step_completed}), `GET /api/auth/api-keys/active` (returns list[APIKeyResponse]). Response schema: `UserProfileResponse` now includes `setup_complete`, `setup_selected_tools`, `setup_step_completed` with safe defaults. Route prefix is `/api/auth` (NOT `/api/v1/auth`). The `/api-keys/active` route is placed before `/api-keys` for correct FastAPI matching.
cascading_impacts: UserProfileResponse has 3 new fields — any frontend consuming GET /me will see them
Route prefix is /api/auth (not /api/v1/auth) — downstream handovers must use correct prefix
sessions.summary: All 6 planned tasks completed. 3 User model columns added, idempotent migration created and verified, PATCH /me/setup-state and GET /api-keys/active endpoints implemented with tenant isolation, UserProfileResponse updated, 18 tests written (9 Pydantic validation + 9 API endpoint tests). All Pydantic tests passing.

sessions.title: WebSocket Setup Events
planned_tasks: Add 3 event models + data models to schemas.py
Wire setup:tool_connected emission from mcp_http.py handle_initialize
Wire setup:commands_installed emission from downloads.py get_bootstrap_prompt
Wire setup:agents_downloaded emission from downloads.py download_agent_templates
TDD tests for event schemas and emissions
tasks_completed: Add 3 event models + data models to schemas.py
Add 3 EventFactory methods
Wire setup:tool_connected emission from mcp_http.py mcp_endpoint (after handle_initialize call)
Wire setup:commands_installed emission from downloads.py get_bootstrap_prompt
Wire setup:agents_downloaded emission from downloads.py download_agent_templates
TDD tests for event schemas and emissions (41 tests passing)
deviations: setup:tool_connected emitted from mcp_endpoint (line ~1357) rather than handle_initialize, because handle_initialize lacks access to the request object needed for ws_manager
sessions.notes_for_next: Event types: 'setup:tool_connected', 'setup:commands_installed', 'setup:agents_downloaded'. Data models: SetupToolConnectedData, SetupCommandsInstalledData, SetupAgentsDownloadedData. Event models: SetupToolConnectedEvent, SetupCommandsInstalledEvent, SetupAgentsDownloadedEvent. Factory methods: EventFactory.setup_tool_connected(tenant_key, user_id, tool_name), EventFactory.setup_commands_installed(tenant_key, user_id, tool_name, command_count), EventFactory.setup_agents_downloaded(tenant_key, user_id, agent_count). All return dict ready for JSON serialization. Emission points: mcp_http.py mcp_endpoint (after handle_initialize, line ~1357), downloads.py get_bootstrap_prompt (line ~571), downloads.py download_agent_templates (line ~342). All emissions are fire-and-forget with try/except guards. Tool name mapping in mcp_endpoint: claude/claude_code -> claude_code, codex -> codex_cli, gemini -> gemini_cli. ws_manager accessed via request.app.state.websocket_manager.
cascading_impacts: 0855d needs to listen for 'setup:tool_connected' via WebSocket on frontend
0855e needs to listen for 'setup:commands_installed' and 'setup:agents_downloaded' via WebSocket on frontend
sessions.summary: Added 3 setup wizard WebSocket event types (setup:tool_connected, setup:commands_installed, setup:agents_downloaded) with Pydantic data/event models, EventFactory methods, and fire-and-forget emission at MCP initialize, bootstrap prompt, and agent template download endpoints. 41 tests passing.

sessions.title: Overlay Shell + Step 1 (Tool Selection)
planned_tasks: Create SetupWizardOverlay.vue with full-screen overlay shell
Build 4-step progress bar with brand styling
Wire into WelcomeView with auto-launch on first login
Add updateSetupState action to user store
tasks_completed: Created SetupWizardOverlay.vue (575 lines) with full-screen overlay, Teleport to body, fade transition
Built 4-step progress bar with active/completed/future states, brand gradient connector fill
Built Step 1 with 3 tool selection cards (claude_code, codex_cli, gemini_cli) — multi-select toggle, smooth-border styling
Placeholder content for Steps 2-4 referencing 0855d/e/f
Added updateSetupState endpoint to api.js (PATCH /api/auth/me/setup-state)
Added updateSetupState action to user store — syncs response fields back to currentUser
Rewrote WelcomeView.vue — removed old localStorage checklist, added overlay with auto-launch and CTA label logic
38 Vitest component tests passing (rendering, progress bar, tool selection, next/back buttons, dismiss, placeholders, accessibility)
deviations: Removed old tutorial CTA logic (tutorialKey/tutorialLaunched/handleTutorialCta) and localStorage checklist from WelcomeView — replaced entirely by setup wizard overlay
Removed startup-cta gradient CSS from WelcomeView (no longer needed)
sessions.notes_for_next: **For 0855d (Step 2 Connect):** Component: `SetupWizardOverlay.vue` at `frontend/src/components/setup/SetupWizardOverlay.vue`. Props: `modelValue` (Boolean), `currentStep` (Number 0-3), `selectedTools` (Array of tool IDs), `mode` ('setup'|'learning'). Emits: `update:modelValue`, `update:currentStep`, `dismiss`, `step-complete` (payload: `{ step: Number, data: Object }`). Tool IDs: 'claude_code', 'codex_cli', 'gemini_cli'. Steps are 0-indexed: 0=Choose Tools, 1=Connect, 2=Install, 3=Launch. Step 2 content renders when `currentStep === 1` — replace the `<div v-else-if="currentStep === 1">` placeholder block. The overlay parent (WelcomeView) calls `userStore.updateSetupState()` on `step-complete` — 0855d should emit `step-complete` with `{ step: 1, data: { ... } }` and the parent will persist. Store action: `userStore.updateSetupState(payload)` calls `PATCH /api/auth/me/setup-state` and syncs response to `currentUser`. API endpoint in `api.js`: `api.auth.updateSetupState(payload)`. `canProceed` computed in overlay currently returns `true` for all steps > 0 — 0855d should add connection validation logic.
cascading_impacts: WelcomeView no longer uses localStorage checklist (giljo_startup_checklist_v1) or tutorial CTA — 0855f should remove StartupQuickStart.vue which also references this key
User store now exposes updateSetupState action — available for 0855d/e/f to use directly
sessions.summary: All 6 planned tasks completed. Created SetupWizardOverlay.vue with full-screen overlay shell, 4-step progress bar with brand gradient, Step 1 tool selection (3 cards with multi-select), placeholder steps 2-4. Integrated into WelcomeView with auto-launch on first login, resume support, and CTA label logic. Added updateSetupState to API service and user store. 38 Vitest tests passing. Brand-compliant: smooth-border, design tokens, 250ms transitions, accessible (ARIA roles, keyboard support).

sessions.title: Step 2 (Connect to GiljoAI)
planned_tasks: Extract config generation to useMcpConfig.js composable
Build SetupStep2Connect.vue with per-tool tabs and config display
Wire API key check and generation flow
Wire WebSocket setup:tool_connected for connection status
tasks_completed: Created useMcpConfig.js composable with: normalizeToolId, detectPlatform, buildServerUrl, isHttps, generateClaudeConfig, generateCodexConfig, generateGeminiConfig, generateOpenclawConfig, generateConfigForTool, generateCodexEnvVar, getCertTrustCommand, makeKeyName
Refactored AiToolConfigWizard.vue to import from composable — removed inline config generation, cert trust constants, makeKeyName, env var generation
Added api.apiKeys.getActive() endpoint to api.js (GET /api/auth/api-keys/active)
Updated test mock in setup.js to include apiKeys.getActive

Created SetupStep2Connect.vue (~270 lines) with: per-tool tabs, server URL display with inline edit, API key check/generate flow, per-tool config display with copy buttons, platform toggle (PowerShell/Linux), HTTPS cert trust section, real-time WebSocket connection status indicators
Wired SetupStep2Connect into SetupWizardOverlay.vue at currentStep===1 with canProceed and step-data bindings
Updated canProceed computed: step 1 requires >= 1 tool connected via WebSocket
handleNext emits step-complete with {step:1, data:{connectedTools:[...]}}
30 Vitest composable tests passing (useMcpConfig.spec.js)
15 Vitest component tests passing (SetupStep2Connect.spec.js)
Updated 2 tests in SetupWizardOverlay.spec.js to reflect 0855d changes (placeholder replaced, canProceed logic updated)
deviations: OpenClaw config generation kept in composable (generateOpenclawConfig) for AiToolConfigWizard modal compatibility, but NOT exposed in wizard step 2 — wizard only shows claude_code, codex_cli, gemini_cli per spec
When only a key_prefix is available (existing key, no plaintext), config commands show YOUR_API_KEY placeholder — user must re-generate or use existing config
sessions.notes_for_next: **For 0855e (Step 3 Install):** Component: `SetupStep2Connect.vue` at `frontend/src/components/setup/SetupStep2Connect.vue`. It emits `can-proceed` (Boolean) and `step-data` ({ connectedTools: string[] }). The overlay parent receives step-complete with `{ step: 1, data: { connectedTools: [...] } }`. Composable `useMcpConfig.js` at `frontend/src/composables/useMcpConfig.js` exports: `normalizeToolId(wizardId)` → legacy ID, `generateConfigForTool(toolId, serverUrl, apiKey)`, `generateCodexEnvVar(apiKey, platform)`, `getCertTrustCommand(platform)`, `buildServerUrl(hostname, port)`, `detectPlatform()`, `makeKeyName(toolId)`, `isHttps()`. WebSocket subscription pattern: `wsStore.on('setup:tool_connected', handler)` — handler receives `{ tool_name }` where tool_name matches normalizeToolId output (claude_code, codex_cli, gemini_cli). Connection status is reactive per-tool in component: `connectionStatus[toolId]` = 'waiting' | 'connected'. The overlay's `canProceed` for step 1 checks `step2CanProceed` ref which is set by the `can-proceed` emit from SetupStep2Connect. Tool IDs remain: claude_code, codex_cli, gemini_cli.
cascading_impacts: useMcpConfig.js composable is now shared — any changes to config format affect both AiToolConfigWizard.vue (standalone modal) and SetupStep2Connect.vue (wizard)
api.apiKeys.getActive added to api.js and test mock setup.js — available for any component
SetupWizardOverlay.spec.js updated: step 1 placeholder test replaced with stub check, canProceed test adjusted to step 2+
sessions.summary: All 6 planned tasks completed. Extracted config generation into useMcpConfig.js composable (12 exported functions). Refactored AiToolConfigWizard.vue to use composable. Built SetupStep2Connect.vue with per-tool tabs, API key check/generation, platform-specific config display with copy buttons, and real-time WebSocket connection status. Wired into SetupWizardOverlay.vue at currentStep===1 with canProceed gating. 83 total tests passing (38 overlay + 30 composable + 15 component).

sessions.title: Step 3 (Install Commands & Agents)
planned_tasks: Build SetupStep3Commands.vue with bootstrap prompt display
tasks_completed: Created SetupStep3Commands.vue (~330 lines script+template, ~280 lines style) with per-tool bootstrap prompt display, copy-to-clipboard, mini-checklist, post-install command, skip link
Bootstrap prompt fetched from /api/download/bootstrap-prompt?platform={toolId} using same pattern as AgentExport.vue (raw fetch with JWT auth)
Mini-checklist subscribes to setup:commands_installed (per-tool match) and setup:agents_downloaded (user-level, marks all tools)
Post-install command shows /gil_get_agents for claude_code/gemini_cli and $gil-get-agents for codex_cli with fade-slide transition
Skip link emits 'skip' event, handled by overlay parent which advances to step 3 with {skipped: true}
Wired SetupStep3Commands into SetupWizardOverlay.vue at currentStep===2 with can-proceed and step-data bindings
Updated canProceed computed: step 2 requires step3CanProceed (>= 1 tool with both checkmarks green)
Added handleStep3Skip to overlay: emits step-complete with {installedTools:[], skipped:true} and advances
Added step2ConnectedTools computed (derived from step2Data.connectedTools) to pass as prop to Step 3
30 Vitest component tests passing (SetupStep3Commands.spec.js)
Updated 2 tests in SetupWizardOverlay.spec.js (placeholder replaced with stub check, canProceed test adjusted to step 3+)
All 83 setup wizard tests passing (30 step3 + 38 overlay + 15 step2)
deviations: Bootstrap prompt uses raw fetch() instead of api service — consistent with existing AgentExport.vue pattern (the api service has no download namespace method for this endpoint)
Reactive state (prompts, promptLoading, promptErrors, toolStatus) initialized eagerly in script setup rather than in onMounted, so template sees correct initial state (loading=true) on first render
setup:agents_downloaded marks ALL connected tools (user-level event has no tool_name), matching the backend emission pattern
sessions.notes_for_next: **For 0855f (Step 4 + E2E Wiring):** Component: `SetupStep3Commands.vue` at `frontend/src/components/setup/SetupStep3Commands.vue`. Props: `selectedTools` (Array), `connectedTools` (Array). Emits: `can-proceed` (Boolean), `step-data` ({ installedTools: string[] }), `skip`. The overlay parent receives step-complete with `{ step: 2, data: { installedTools: [...] } }` or `{ step: 2, data: { installedTools: [], skipped: true } }` for skip. The overlay's `canProceed` for step 2 checks `step3CanProceed` ref set by the `can-proceed` emit. `step2ConnectedTools` computed derives connected tool IDs from `step2Data.connectedTools` and is passed to Step 3 as the `connected-tools` prop. WebSocket subscriptions: `setup:commands_installed` (per-tool, matches tool_name to toolStatus keys), `setup:agents_downloaded` (user-level, marks all tools). Tool agent commands: claude_code/gemini_cli use `/gil_get_agents`, codex_cli uses `$gil-get-agents`. The skip handler in overlay emits step-complete with skipped flag and advances step. All 83 tests pass. Overlay stubs: SetupStep2Connect and SetupStep3Commands are both stubbed in overlay tests.
cascading_impacts: SetupWizardOverlay.vue now imports SetupStep3Commands — any changes to Step 3 props/emits affect the overlay wiring
SetupWizardOverlay.spec.js updated: step 2 placeholder test replaced with stub check, canProceed test adjusted from step 2+ to step 3+
step2ConnectedTools computed added to overlay — 0855f can use this pattern for passing data between steps
sessions.summary: All 6 planned tasks completed. Created SetupStep3Commands.vue with per-tool bootstrap prompt fetching, copy-to-clipboard, auto-updating mini-checklist via WebSocket (setup:commands_installed + setup:agents_downloaded), post-install /gil_get_agents command display, Codex $gil-get-agents variant, and skip link. Wired into SetupWizardOverlay.vue at currentStep===2 with canProceed gating. 30 new Vitest tests + 2 updated overlay tests. All 83 setup wizard tests passing.
